terms.summary: S1 applies an unremovable four-round DEF -25% status before one 280% ATK dummy hit.
S2 uses 4 hits at 380% for its first two activations and Astrum Natalis, 8 hits at 760%, from the third activation.
Every three rounds, enhanced normal is granted to self and the slowest other ally; either recipient's enhanced normal reduces that actor's cooldowns by one.
Barrier states are retained for display; their incoming damage blocking is not calculated.
Internal skill replacement marker is represented by S2 use-history thresholds.

effectGroups.summary: Unremovable Boss DEF -25% for four rounds.
Removable hit-rate buff on Astrum Natalis; retained for Buff count only.
Slowest-other-ally enhanced-normal state; consumed after that ally's normal attack reduces both skill cooldowns by one.
Unremovable barrier state retained without incoming-damage calculation.

ignored.summary: Hit rate does not change deterministic dummy damage.
Enhanced-normal debuff cleansing is not simulated.
Self and barrier incoming damage blocking are not simulated.
